properties.titulo_evento: Iran, US agree to halt war and reopen Hormuz
properties.descricao: The memorandum of understanding is scheduled to be officially signed on Friday in Switzerland.

properties.titulo_evento: France picks MBDA-Safran combo to supply multiple rocket launcher
properties.descricao: Paris snubbed competing offers from Thales and ArianeGroup, as well as from U.S. defense giant Lockheed Martin and South Korea's Hanwha Aerospace.

properties.titulo_evento: France prepares Ukraine-inspired ‘kill web’ for battlefield awareness
properties.descricao: The kill web will be part of the broader Arcadia AI-powered battlefield command and control structure, a top French commander said.

properties.titulo_evento: Interview: French Army chief Schill talks technology, surprise and ‘archaic’ combat
properties.descricao: "We should avoid excessive analogies. France is not Ukraine," said Gen. Pierre Schill in an interview ahead of the Eurosatory defense expo near Paris.

properties.titulo_evento: US fuel prices to take ‘months’ to normalise after US-Iran deal to end war
properties.descricao: Producers will need time to ramp up output, while port bottlenecks and heightened demand will keep US prices up.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Trump says MoU with Tehran signed electronically
properties.descricao: Backlash to US-Iran deal grows in Israel as Iranian vessels pass through Strait of Hormuz after US lifts naval blockade.

properties.titulo_evento: 7-year-old mourns father and brother killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
properties.descricao: 7-year-old mourns father and brother killed in Israeli strike on Gaza.

properties.titulo_evento: EU officially launches Ukraine and Moldova accession process
properties.descricao: Kyiv sees EU accession as a security guarantee and alignment with Western values as it defends against Russian invasion.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump touts Iran deal and Ukraine ambition as he arrives at G7
properties.descricao: Amid G7 tensions, Trump says Iran agreement is a step towards peace in the Middle East and beyond.

properties.titulo_evento: Netanyahu says Israel won’t leave occupied land in Lebanon
properties.descricao: Israel's occupation of territory in Lebanon and Syria will continue, PM Netanyahu said, despite US deal with Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: EU fails to agree on sanctions for far-right Israeli minister Ben-Gvir
properties.descricao: EU diplomacy chief Kaja Kallas confirms EU remains divided on sanctioning Israel

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says deal to end war with Iran already signed and details to be released 'pretty soon'
properties.descricao: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be open from Friday but there is still confusion about the exact contents of the agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
properties.descricao: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
properties.descricao: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people.

properties.titulo_evento: Fifa seeks explanation over VAR official's hand gesture
properties.descricao: Fifa is seeking an explanation over a hand gesture made by video assistant referee Shaun Evans before Germany's 7-1 win over Curacao on Sunday.

properties.titulo_evento: China detains two leaders of influential underground church
properties.descricao: More than 30 members of Early Rain Covenant Church were taken for interrogation midway through Sunday service.

properties.titulo_evento: G7 leaders to meet Zelensky as Trump signals possible Ukraine breakthrough
properties.descricao: G7 leaders will hold talks with President Volodymyr Zelensky on Ukraine on Tuesday, as US President Donald Trump suggested there may be room for progress after more than four years of war with Russia. The summit in Evian will also address Iran, amid...

properties.titulo_evento: France shuts down twelve Israeli stands at defence trade show
properties.descricao: A dozen Israeli company stands were shut down Monday at a major international defence and security exhibition held outside Paris, sparking outrage from authorities in Israel. Tensions have persisted in French-Israeli relations, with France recognisi...

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war 'has been a strategic disaster for the State of Israel', analyst says
properties.descricao: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is on a collision course with Donald Trump as the U.S. president seeks to extricate himself from the war, with both men's goals unmet and Israeli military operations tied down in Lebanon. Speaking with FRANC...

properties.titulo_evento: EU, Ukraine start formal accession talks after Orban delay
properties.descricao: The EU has formally opened the first stage of accession negotiations with Ukraine. This comes two years later than planned, as former Hungarian PM Viktor Orban was blocking the process prior to his election defeat.

properties.titulo_evento: Strait of Hormuz reopening won't end shipping risks
properties.descricao: A proposed US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz is raising hopes for global shipping and oil markets. But naval mines, high insurance costs and geopolitical risks mean disruption could persist for months.

properties.titulo_evento: Ibrahim Maza: Algeria's 'multicultural kid' from Berlin
properties.descricao: Ibo Maza had his choice of three different countries. Instead of his native Germany, the Bayer Leverkusen forward is representing Algeria, the country of his father, at the World Cup in North America.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran: Reported peace deal sparks both relief and anger
properties.descricao: A peace deal between the US and Iran is due to be signed this week — and while the hopes of peace may yet be dashed, the news alone was enough to trigger celebrations, backlash and political infighting on both sides.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran deal: When will oil prices fall?
properties.descricao: A potential US-Iran deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz could ease the global energy crunch, but oil prices and supplies may take months to stabilize as shipping restarts and infrastructure recovers.

properties.titulo_evento: G7 summit begins, with Iran and Ukraine dominating agenda
properties.descricao: The heads of the world's richest nations are gathering in France this week. The EU wants Ukraine to be discussed, while the US has promised peace with Iran. G7 leaders are cautiously optimistic. DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia strikes leave historic Kyiv cathedral in flames
properties.descricao: The Kyiv Pechersk Lavra monastery, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, was set on fire as Russia struck multiple cities in Ukraine overnight. Meanwhile, Moscow reported three deaths from a Ukrainian drone attack.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump hosts White House cage fights to mark 80th birthday
properties.descricao: The US president watched seven fights with an audience of 4,000 people inside a specially built arena on the White House lawn. Critics say the unprecendented spectacle is in poor taste amid the ongoing Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Manuel Neuer: The aura of a record-breaking goalkeeper
properties.descricao: Germany's hopes at the 2026 World Cup are connected to world-class goalkeeper Manuel Neuer's fitness and form.

properties.titulo_evento: Manuel Neuer fit to join Germany in first World Cup match
properties.descricao: Veteran goalkeeper Manuel Neuer is set to play in Germany's first match in this year's World Cup. He had retired from the national team in August 2024.

properties.titulo_evento: Brussels diplomats mourn end of US-hosted ‘like-minded’ dinners
properties.descricao: Monthly gatherings were once a staple of Washington’s influence operation in the EU capital. Now that key channel for informal diplomacy has all but disappeared.

properties.titulo_evento: UK hits Russia with fresh energy sanctions at G7
properties.descricao: EVIAN-LES-BAINS, France — Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced fresh energy sanctions on Russia and a deal to supply Ukraine’s nuclear plants for the next two years, as he meets partners at the G7 summit. The U.K.’s latest package of...

properties.titulo_evento: Global Markets Rally on Iran Peace Hopes
properties.descricao: A framework agreement could be signed later this week, but details are scarce. Still, investors are cheering the potential breakthrough.

properties.titulo_evento: China Moves the Price of Oil, Even When It Buys Less
properties.descricao: China is the world’s largest purchaser of oil. But three months after the war with Iran began, it cut its imports, cushioning the global market.

properties.titulo_evento: Taking on Neo-Nazis, One Trademark at a Time
properties.descricao: In Germany, a campaign called Rights Against the Right is securing trademarks for right-wing symbols and phrases, aiming to cut into a revenue stream that sustains hate groups.

properties.titulo_evento: Stocks Surge as U.S. and Iran Reach Preliminary Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Oil prices fell and stocks gained early Monday after Iran and the U.S. reached a deal that may allow more energy and other goods to flow through the Strait of Hormuz.
